title: Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange
description: Diffie-Hellman lets two parties derive a shared secret over a public channel using group exponentiation. In Bitcoin systems, elliptic-curve variants appear in encrypted transport and protocol design patterns.

resources.title: BIP 324: v2 P2P Transport Protocol
resources.notes: Shows how modern Bitcoin transport uses ECDH-derived shared secrets.

resources.title: secp256k1 ECDH API
resources.notes: Concrete library interface for ECDH over secp256k1.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: P2P Attacks
resources.notes: Threat-model context for why encrypted and authenticated transport matters.
